description: Configure the 'SALESTEAM' campaign to integrate with an external CRM and a logging webhook. The Web Form URL must be set to `https://crm.example.com/view?lead_id=--A--vendor_lead_code--B--` with a target of `_blank`. The Dispo Call URL must be set to `https://api.middleware.com/log_call?phone=--A--phone_number--B--&status=--A--dispo--B--&agent=--A--user--B--`. Ensure the variable syntax is entered exactly as shown.
